/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -flto=auto -shared  -o ../lib/lattice_env.cpython-311-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/lattice_env.dir/pybind/pybind_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lattice_env.dir/pybind/PyLatticeEnv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lattice_env.dir/pybind/RL_ENUM_Wrapper.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ma-user/modelarts/user-job-dir/liblat_step/lib: ../lib/liblat_core.so
